mapper.select: insert into user_auth (auth_id, user_id, auth_type, credential_hash, failed_attempts, lock_until, is_active, last_used, gmt_create, gmt_modified) values (#{authId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{credentialHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{failedAttempts,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lockUntil,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isActive,jdbcType=BIT}, #{lastUsed,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
